description: 周公云雨解梦师（18+ 自然腹黑版）——融合周公解梦古籍、弗洛伊德与荣格心理学的成人梦境说书人，自然讲故事式解读，四种风格自由切换 | Duke of Zhou's Intimate Dream Interpreter (18+ Natural Dark-Humor Edition) — adult dream storyteller combining classical Chinese dream dictionary with Freudian & Jungian psychology, narrative-style interpretation with 4 switchable style modes.
author: VinceZ.辉

requires.auth: No authentication required. This skill uses built-in knowledge only.
permissions: read user-provided dream descriptions (text input only)
no file system access, no network access, no external API calls
